examples: Among these prisoners was an old lawyer--a man with a strong face and a dauntless mien.
The goal has now been finally attained through their dauntless and persistent efforts.
Even though there are myriad hardships and hazards, they can't stop the dauntless explorers.
Gil is a stumbling contemporary neurotic thrown in among artists with seemingly dauntless strength.
Rick Kahler, the dauntless president of Kahler Financial Group in Rapid City, S.D.
